name: Afilias
notes:
Identity Digital (formerly Afilias) operates DNS for many TLDs/ccTLDs such as .INFO, .ORG, .PRO, .XXX and .NU and many others.

We currently are not able to take on new peering sessions. This may change within the next few months.

At all the European exchange points we now only peer with the route servers, and no longer do direct peering sessions until further notice. If you want to receive our prefixes, please make sure that you peer with the local route servers at each exchange point.

Please configure 200 or higher as max-prefixes for both IPv4 and IPv6 and accept prefixes up to /24 and /48 respectively for best results. Note that we auto-config max prefix on your session based on your PeeringDB entry, so please make sure it is up to date.

Please also note that due to the nature of our service (global anycast DNS) we are not able to aggregate down any further, in case you are wondering why you are seeing many /24 and /48 prefixes from us.
